decision.summary: Hold the resolved-style 67k daily long into settlement and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The only live BTC position, `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29` Yes, is already marked at 100% with BTC at 67527.6, so under the take-profit exception it can be left to resolve naturally rather than closed early. Recent Beecthor transcripts and summaries still imply macro bearish continuation after a rebound/squeeze, and Binance confirms that rebound has already extended; however the daily slot is already occupied by the open March 29 daily position and no weekly or monthly BTC markets are provided here, so there is no valid additional entry this cycle. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
